title.zh: 美国数据中心转向燃气电源引发清洁能源反击，AI算力许可进入能源政治阶段
title.en: US data centres turn toward gas power, triggering clean-energy pushback as AI permitting becomes energy politics

summary.zh: AP今天报道，AI用电增长正推动更多数据中心转向燃气电源，同时纽约、明尼苏达、密歇根等州的清洁能源支持者正推动法规，要求数据中心在长期内达到高比例可再生电力。今天的信号不是“AI需要更多电”这么简单，而是算力建设已经进入地方电价、排放目标、电网接入和许可政治的组合战。
summary.en: AP reports today that AI electricity growth is pushing more data centres toward gas-fired power, while clean-energy advocates in states such as New York, Minnesota, and Michigan are proposing rules requiring high renewable shares over time. The signal is no longer simply that AI needs more electricity; compute build-out is becoming a combined fight over local power prices, emissions targets, grid access, and permitting politics.

watch.zh: 观察地方政府是否把数据中心审批与清洁电力、用水、噪声和电价保护绑定，这会改变园区选址和融资模型。
watch.en: Watch whether local governments tie data-centre approval to clean power, water use, noise, and ratepayer protection, because that will reshape siting and financing models.

liveUpdates.reference: AP, As gas plants rise to power AI, renewable energy allies are fighting for cleaner alternatives, published 2026-07-12

referenceLinks.label: AP: Gas plants, AI data centres, and clean-energy pushback

title.zh: Microsoft继续重组Xbox，游戏行业的问题从内容创意转向硬件成本、订阅增长和AI资本开支挤压
title.en: Microsoft keeps restructuring Xbox as the games industry shifts from creative pipeline issues to hardware cost, subscription growth, and AI capex pressure

summary.zh: AP报道，Microsoft新一轮裁员中Xbox受冲击明显，管理层将其描述为游戏业务重置。对行业更关键的是，主机硬件成本、Game Pass增长瓶颈、并购后整合和AI资本开支正在同时挤压传统游戏业务。游戏公司不再只是在争夺爆款内容，也在重新计算平台、硬件和订阅模式的资本回报。
summary.en: AP reports that Xbox is heavily affected in Microsoft’s latest layoff round, with management framing it as a reset of the gaming business. The deeper industry issue is that console hardware costs, Game Pass growth limits, post-acquisition integration, and AI capital spending are pressuring traditional games economics at the same time. Game companies are no longer only chasing hit content; they are recalculating capital returns across platforms, hardware, and subscription models.

watch.zh: 观察更多工作室是否被出售或独立化，以及AI投资是否继续从游戏内容和硬件周期中抽走预算。
watch.en: Watch whether more studios are sold or spun out, and whether AI investment keeps pulling budget away from games content and hardware cycles.

liveUpdates.reference: AP, Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, including many at Xbox, published 2026-07-07

referenceLinks.label: AP: Microsoft cuts jobs and resets Xbox

title.zh: 日本提出到2040年部署千万级机器人，physical AI开始从企业实验走向国家劳动力战略
title.en: Japan targets ten million robots by 2040 as physical AI moves from corporate experiments to national labour strategy

summary.zh: 近期报道显示，日本计划到2040年在医疗、食品制造、灾害响应等18个领域部署约1000万台机器人，并通过SoftBank、NEC、Sony、Honda等联合力量推进physical AI。这个方向说明，机器人竞争正在从“谁的演示更像人”转向“谁能把老龄化、护理、制造和灾害响应做成长期产业系统”。
summary.en: Recent reporting says Japan plans to deploy about ten million robots by 2040 across eighteen sectors, including healthcare, food manufacturing, and disaster response, with SoftBank, NEC, Sony, and Honda-linked efforts supporting physical AI. The signal is that robotics competition is moving from who has the most human-like demo to who can turn ageing, care, manufacturing, and disaster response into a long-term industrial system.

watch.zh: 观察机器人部署是否进入保险、职业培训、现场安全和公共采购规则，而不仅停留在企业发布会。
watch.en: Watch whether robot deployment enters insurance, vocational training, site safety, and public-procurement rules rather than remaining a launch-event narrative.

liveUpdates.reference: Tom’s Guide, Japan plans to deploy 10 million robots by 2040, published 2026-07-07

referenceLinks.label: Tom’s Guide: Japan physical AI robot deployment plan

title.zh: 基础设施巡检正在从人工目视转向多模态无人机数据，但真正价值在缺陷决策而不是航拍图像
title.en: Infrastructure inspection is moving from visual walkthroughs to multimodal UAV data, but value lies in defect decisions rather than aerial images

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026年综述；范围：150余项AEC+FM无人机巡检研究，覆盖RGB、LiDAR、热成像、路径优化、YOLO/Faster R-CNN和多模态融合。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 review of more than 150 UAV inspection studies in AEC+FM, covering RGB imagery, LiDAR, thermal sensing, path optimisation, YOLO/Faster R-CNN, and multimodal fusion.

summary.zh: 这篇综述指出，无人机已经从“拍照工具”变成基础设施巡检的数据采集平台，但工程价值不在照片本身，而在如何把RGB、LiDAR和热成像融合成可追踪的缺陷识别、几何偏差和维护优先级。对结构工程师来说，未来巡检能力会越来越接近数据治理问题：飞行路径、传感器质量、缺陷标签、模型泛化和维修决策必须连成闭环。会读图纸的人还需要会判断数据是否足以支持工程结论。
summary.en: This review shows that UAVs have moved beyond photography into infrastructure data acquisition, but the engineering value is not the image itself. It is the ability to fuse RGB, LiDAR, and thermal data into traceable defect detection, geometric inconsistency, and maintenance priority. For structural engineers, future inspection capability becomes a data-governance problem: flight path, sensor quality, defect labels, model generalisation, and repair decisions must form one loop. Engineers who read drawings will also need to judge whether the data is sufficient to support an engineering conclusion.

caveat.zh: 自动识别仍受光照、遮挡、构件复杂度和训练数据偏差影响，不能替代最终工程判断。
caveat.en: Automated recognition remains sensitive to lighting, occlusion, component complexity, and training-data bias, so it cannot replace final engineering judgment.

insights.reference: Nikkhah et al., UAV-Based Infrastructure Inspections, arXiv:2601.11665

title.zh: 岩土数字孪生的关键不是更精细的三维模型，而是把不确定性带进施工决策
title.en: The key to geotechnical digital twins is not a finer 3D model, but bringing uncertainty into construction decisions

evidence.zh: 研究类型：概率数字孪生框架；方法：贝叶斯更新、认知不确定性、随机不确定性、模型不确定性和施工阶段信息更新。
evidence.en: Evidence: probabilistic digital-twin framework using Bayesian updating and explicit aleatory, epistemic, model, and construction-stage uncertainty.

summary.zh: 岩土工程的不确定性通常比上部结构更强：勘察点有限、土层连续性不完整、施工扰动和地下水变化都会改变设计判断。这篇框架把数字孪生从确定性模型推进到概率数字孪生，强调随着施工信息增加不断更新土体参数和预测。对结构和土木工程师的启发是，基础和地下工程的数字化不应只追求模型漂亮，而要能说明风险如何收敛、哪些假设被现场数据推翻、什么时候需要调整支护或基础方案。
summary.en: Geotechnical uncertainty is often stronger than superstructure uncertainty: boreholes are sparse, stratigraphy is incomplete, construction disturbs the ground, and groundwater changes the design state. This framework moves from deterministic digital twins to probabilistic digital twins, updating soil parameters and predictions as construction information arrives. For civil and structural engineers, digitalisation of foundations and underground works should not aim only for a polished model; it should show how risk narrows, which assumptions are contradicted by site data, and when support or foundation schemes must change.

caveat.zh: 该框架需要高质量施工监测和数据治理，否则概率更新可能只是形式化包装。
caveat.en: The framework depends on high-quality construction monitoring and data governance; otherwise probabilistic updating becomes a formal wrapper rather than useful evidence.

insights.reference: Cotoarbă, Straub and Smith, Probabilistic digital twins for geotechnical design and construction, arXiv:2412.09432

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Probabilistic digital twins for geotechnical design and construction

title.zh: AI负载的秒级功率波动开始影响整栋设施规划，电气与土建设计需要同桌决策
title.en: Second-level AI power fluctuations now affect whole-facility planning, forcing electrical and civil design onto the same table

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026年实测研究；方法：以0.1秒分辨率测量H100 GPU训练、微调和推理负载，并上推至整栋数据中心能耗轮廓。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 measurement study using 0.1-second H100 GPU power profiles for training, fine-tuning, and inference, scaled to whole-facility data-centre energy profiles.

summary.zh: 这项研究把AI工作负载的高频功率曲线连接到整栋设施能耗，说明数据中心不是稳定负荷盒子。训练、微调和推理会产生不同的瞬态功率特征，进而影响配电、备用电源、冷却、微电网和并网评估。对土木工程师而言，这意味着机房结构荷载、冷却设备布置、设备更新空间和施工分期不能脱离电气暂态讨论。AI数据中心会把传统“建筑先行、电气后配”的流程推向更早期的系统协同。
summary.en: This study connects high-resolution AI workload power profiles to whole-facility energy demand, showing that a data centre is not a stable load box. Training, fine-tuning, and inference produce different transient power signatures, affecting distribution, backup power, cooling, microgrids, and interconnection assessment. For civil engineers, rack loads, cooling equipment layout, future upgrade space, and construction staging cannot be separated from electrical transients. AI data centres push the traditional building-first, electrical-later process toward earlier system co-design.

caveat.zh: 数据来自特定H100高性能计算环境，项目应用仍需根据芯片类型、PUE、冗余等级和当地电网条件校准。
caveat.en: The measurements come from a specific H100 HPC environment; project use still needs calibration for chip type, PUE, redundancy level, and local grid conditions.

insights.reference: Vercellino et al., Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles, arXiv:2604.07345

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Generative AI workload power profiles for facility planning

title.zh: 混凝土长期变形：为什么中外规范都讲收缩徐变，但设计审查不能只看瞬时挠度？
title.en: Concrete long-term deformation: why codes discuss shrinkage and creep, and why design review cannot stop at instantaneous deflection

text.zh: 混凝土构件的使用性能审查，常见误区是只看施工或短期荷载下的瞬时挠度。中国、澳洲、欧洲和美国规范都会处理收缩、徐变和长期挠度，但表达入口不同：有的通过长期刚度折减，有的通过徐变系数和收缩应变，有的通过简化倍增系数或有效模量。核心物理一致：混凝土在持续应力下会随时间继续变形，干燥和水化引起的收缩还会在约束条件下转化为裂缝或附加应力。跨规范复核时，应先区分弹性应变、徐变应变、收缩应变和开裂后刚度，再讨论限值是否满足。
text.en: A common serviceability-review mistake is to check only the instantaneous deflection under construction or short-term loading. Chinese, Australian, European, and US codes all address shrinkage, creep, and long-term deflection, but through different entry points: long-term stiffness reduction, creep coefficient and shrinkage strain, simplified multipliers, or effective modulus. The physics is the same: concrete continues to deform under sustained stress, and drying or hydration shrinkage can become cracking or additional stress when restrained. A cross-code review should first separate elastic strain, creep strain, shrinkage strain, and post-cracking stiffness before discussing whether a limit is satisfied.

text.zh: 瞬时挠度反映加载当下的刚度；长期挠度还包含徐变、收缩、开裂发展和配筋约束。楼板、梁、预应力构件和高层竖向构件都可能被长期效应控制。
text.en: Instantaneous deflection reflects stiffness at loading time; long-term deflection also includes creep, shrinkage, cracking evolution, and reinforcement restraint. Slabs, beams, prestressed members, and vertical elements in tall buildings can all be governed by time effects.

text.zh: 欧洲更常显式使用徐变系数和收缩应变；澳洲和美国设计说明中常看到长期挠度倍增、有效刚度或裂后刚度模型；中国项目审查常把裂缝宽度、长期挠度和施工养护一起看。
text.en: Eurocode language more explicitly uses creep coefficients and shrinkage strain. Australian and US design notes often use long-term deflection multipliers, effective stiffness, or cracked-stiffness models. Chinese project review often considers crack width, long-term deflection, curing, and construction sequence together.

text.zh: 真正需要说明的是：持续荷载取值、加载龄期、环境湿度、截面尺寸、开裂状态、配筋率、预应力损失和施工阶段是否进入长期变形判断。
text.en: The real review questions are whether sustained load, loading age, ambient humidity, member size, cracking state, reinforcement ratio, prestress loss, and construction stages have been included in the long-term deformation assessment.

takeaway.zh: 跨规范比较长期挠度时，不要只问限值是L/250还是L/300。先问计算模型是否包含收缩徐变、裂后刚度和施工阶段；否则短期通过的构件，长期可能仍出现楼面下挠、隔墙开裂或预应力损失偏大。
takeaway.en: In cross-code long-term deflection review, do not start by comparing whether the limit is L/250 or L/300. First ask whether shrinkage, creep, cracked stiffness, and construction staging are included; otherwise a member that passes short-term checks may still develop floor sag, partition cracking, or excessive prestress loss.

title.zh: 实例：同一弹性应变下，徐变系数如何放大长期混凝土应变？
title.en: Example: how a creep coefficient amplifies long-term concrete strain for the same elastic strain

intro.zh: 假设某混凝土受压区在持续应力下的初始弹性应变 εe = 300 με，示意徐变系数 φ = 2.0，自由收缩应变 εsh = 250 με。这里只做一维量级说明，不替代规范长期挠度计算。
intro.en: Assume an initial elastic strain εe = 300 microstrain in a sustained compression zone, illustrative creep coefficient φ = 2.0, and free shrinkage strain εsh = 250 microstrain. This is a one-dimensional magnitude illustration, not a replacement for code long-term deflection calculation.

citation.zh: 推导关系：线性徐变的常用工程表达；依据 ACI 209R 与 fib Model Code 的徐变系数概念（示意式，非单一规范编号公式）。
citation.en: Derived relation: common engineering expression for linear creep; based on the creep-coefficient concept in ACI 209R and fib Model Code (illustrative, not one numbered code equation).

result.zh: εcr = 2.0 × 300 = 600 με。持续荷载下，徐变应变可达到初始弹性应变的两倍量级。
result.en: εcr = 2.0 × 300 = 600 microstrain. Under sustained load, creep strain can reach twice the initial elastic strain in this illustration.

citation.zh: 推导关系：弹性、徐变与自由收缩应变叠加；基于混凝土长期变形教材与模型规范的服务性分析语言（示意式）。
citation.en: Derived relation: superposition of elastic, creep, and free shrinkage strain; based on serviceability-analysis language in concrete long-term deformation texts and model codes (illustrative).

result.zh: εtot = 300 + 600 + 250 = 1150 με。若只看瞬时弹性应变，会严重低估长期变形量级。
result.en: εtot = 300 + 600 + 250 = 1150 microstrain. Checking only instantaneous elastic strain would substantially underestimate the long-term deformation magnitude.

citation.zh: 推导关系：有效模量法的简化表达；见 ACI 209R 长期变形方法与混凝土徐变教材中的 effective modulus method（示意式）。
citation.en: Derived relation: simplified effective-modulus expression; see ACI 209R long-term deformation methods and concrete-creep texts on the effective modulus method (illustrative).

result.zh: 若 φ = 2.0，则 Eeff ≈ Ec / 3。长期分析中等效刚度显著降低，挠度和二阶效应可能被放大。
result.en: If φ = 2.0, then Eeff ≈ Ec / 3. In long-term analysis the equivalent stiffness is substantially reduced, so deflection and second-order effects may increase.

note.zh: 这个例子说明，收缩徐变不是附录里的材料细节，而是服务性、裂缝、预应力损失和长期线形控制的核心输入。跨体系复核时，应把加载龄期、环境、构件尺寸和持续荷载比例写清楚。
note.en: This example shows that shrinkage and creep are not minor material notes; they are core inputs for serviceability, cracking, prestress loss, and long-term profile control. Cross-system review should state loading age, environment, member size, and sustained-load ratio explicitly.

classroom.references: ACI 209R; fib Model Code; EN 1992-1-1 shrinkage and creep provisions; concrete creep and shrinkage literature

referenceLinks.label: ACI 209R guide for modelling and calculating shrinkage and creep
Engineering LibreTexts: Creep and shrinkage of concrete overview
